caption: A man with glasses, a grey faux-hair piece, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and gold suspenders. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. On the left and right sides of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" accompanied by a microphone icon. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze shifting minimally. The background, his clothing, and the equipment remain static throughout the scene.
